dialogBody: Do not send messages or edit while exporting. Turn numbers match chat labels "Ch. {n}" (0-based, inclusive range).
ordinalHint: Same numbering as chat turn labels
includeMetaDesc: Export model, duration, reply tokens; show send tokens under user messages
includeAvatarsDesc: Embed avatars in HTML (larger file size)
customCssDesc: Appended after default styles; clear and save to restore defaults
embedRemoved: Embedded frame removed (unsafe in offline HTML)
